name: Michael Polanyi
summary: Practitioner-judgment writing skill for grounded, directional, bounded answers under ambiguity, trade-offs, critique, and incomplete information.
description: Use this skill when the user wants practitioner judgment instead of generic balance: advice, critique, strategy, or decision-making help that is technically correct but generic / 正确但很空, abstract, shallow, or not battle-tested.
notes: This file is a submission record for aghub/skillhub-style registries.
Do not publish the full repository archive as the installable package directly unless the registry can extract package_path.
The installable zip should expose SKILL.md at the archive root and should be built from skills/michael-polanyi/.
package_url / update_url point to the expected GitHub release assets.
